title: Embed Live365 iframe player in the On Air Now section

requirements.text: Embed the Live365 iframe player (`<iframe width="450" height="316" frameborder="0" src="https://live365.com/embeds/v1/player/a57949?s=md&m=dark&c=mp3"></iframe>`) inside the `OnAirNow` component (`frontend/src/components/OnAirNow.tsx`), positioned prominently within the section. The iframe must be responsive — wrap it in a container that caps its max width and centers it horizontally so it fits well on both mobile and desktop layouts while preserving the existing country theme styling around it.

quotes: add <iframe width="450" height="316" frameborder="0" src="https://live365.com/embeds/v1/player/a57949?s=md&m=dark&c=mp3"></iframe> to now playing section

acceptanceCriteria: The Live365 iframe player is visible inside the OnAirNow component on the public Home page.
The iframe src is exactly `https://live365.com/embeds/v1/player/a57949?s=md&m=dark&c=mp3` with width=450, height=316, and frameborder=0.
The iframe is centered horizontally and does not overflow its container on mobile viewports.
The existing OnAirNow content (ON AIR badge, show title, schedule, DJ name, or the 'nothing on air' message) remains intact alongside the player.
The overall country theme styling of the OnAirNow section is preserved.

constraints: Do not alter the Live365 iframe URL or any of its query parameters.
Do not modify files listed in frontend.immutablePaths.
nonGoals: Making the hero section's existing play button functional.
Adding any other third-party audio players.
